result.stdout:
note [notecli-options]
      notecli-options:
        --version | -v  (Check the current version of notecli)

note [command] <command-argument> [command-options]
      Commands:
        add <YOUR NOTE>
        delete <NOTE ID>
        update <NOTE ID>
        done <NOTE ID>
        undone <NOTE ID>
        list [options]
        clear [options]

      command-options:
        --all | -a   (List all notes including done)
        --done | -d  (clear only done notes)
